description_long: This treadmill features a sleek, rectangular base with a wide, flat running belt and a prominent, angled control console at the front. The console displays a digital interface with colored buttons and a readout, likely for speed, distance, and other metrics, and is supported by two sturdy arms. The running surface is bordered by slightly raised side panels, providing a secure area for the user. The treadmill's frame appears to be constructed from dark, metallic or composite materials, giving it a modern and robust appearance. The rear of the treadmill is simple and boxy, with no visible moving parts or attachments. Overall, the design is utilitarian and suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments such as garages or community gyms.
description: A modern treadmill with a wide running belt, angled digital control console, and sturdy dark frame. The design is robust and functional, suitable for urban fitness settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the running belt, the angled control console, and the supporting arms.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the control console with visible buttons and display, and the full width of the running belt.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the console's angle and side panel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the boxy back of the treadmill and the top of the running belt, with some text visible on the rear panel.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is located at the front, elevated and angled towards the user, featuring a digital display with colored buttons (red and green) and a visible readout, likely for speed and other metrics.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, occupying most of the base, with a smooth, dark surface and slight side borders for safety. It appears to be made of rubber and is flush with the frame.
attribute_handrails: Handrails are not distinctly visible, but the supporting arms for the console may serve as minimal side supports. No padded or extended grips are apparent.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is rectangular, integrated into the control panel, and appears digital with visible colored indicators and text, likely showing workout information.
attribute_power_cord: A power cord is faintly visible at the rear left of the treadmill, emerging from the base, but its length and whether it is detachable are not clearly discernible.
